title: Şalālah Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Şalālah, with a Z-Score of +3.11. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Şalālah is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 9.9 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 69%, which is relatively high, and the wind speed is 1.4 km/h. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the heat wave's effects in Şalālah immediately.
